4.3Directives

Configuration

Marque configuration is split into two layers:

  • Site-level defaults in marque.toml
  • Page-level overrides in frontmatter

marque.toml essentials

toml
title = Marque
description = Built with Marque
layout = topnav
theme = default
width = 82

What these keys control:

  • title: site title used in page titles and branding
  • description: default meta description
  • layout: default layout for pages
  • theme: default theme for pages
  • width: default page content width

How this maps to mdBook-style config thinking

If you come from mdBook's book.toml:

  • book.title -> title
  • book.description -> description
  • src is effectively pages/ in Marque
  • output directory is dist/ after marque build

Marque keeps the config intentionally small and focused.

Build and watch behavior

sh
marque serve .
marque build .
  • serve watches source/config/summary and rebuilds automatically
  • build emits static output into dist/

Navigation source

summary.mq is the source of nav labels and ordering.
A page can exist in pages/ without appearing in nav if not listed in summary.
